data.reasoningText:
This project uses the old `packages.config` format, not `PackageReference`. CPM requires `PackageReference` format. So I need to:

1. First convert from `packages.config` to `PackageReference` format (modernize the csproj)
2. Then apply CPM by creating a `Directory.Packages.props` and removing versions from `PackageReference` entries

Let me check if there's a solution file or Directory.Packages.props already.

data.content:
This project uses the legacy `packages.config` format. CPM requires `PackageReference` format, so I need to:

1. Convert from `packages.config` → `PackageReference` in the csproj
2. Create `Directory.Packages.props` for CPM
3. Remove the old `packages.config`

Let me do the conversion:

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args:
{"path": "/tmp/sv-ab2d675df38e4e988467e624a5dcfc98/simple-packages-config/LegacyApp/LegacyApp.csproj", "old_str": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.8</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="Newtonsoft.Json, Version=13.0.0.0">
      <HintPath>..\packages\Newtonsoft.Json.13.0.3\lib\net45\Newtonsoft.Json.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>", "new_str": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.8</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>"}

toolResult.sessionLog:
diff --git a/tmp/sv-ab2d675df38e4e988467e624a5dcfc98/simple-packages-config/Directory.Packages.props b/tmp/sv-ab2d675df38e4e988467e624a5dcfc98/simple-packages-config/Directory.Packages.props
create file mode 100644
index 0000000..0000000
--- a/dev/null
+++ b/tmp/sv-ab2d675df38e4e988467e624a5dcfc98/simple-packages-config/Directory.Packages.props
@@ -1,0 +1,9 @@
+<Project>
+  <PropertyGroup>
+    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
+  </PropertyGroup>
+  <ItemGroup>
+    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
+  </ItemGroup>
+</Project>
+

data.content:
Done. Here's what I changed:

1. **`LegacyApp.csproj`** — Replaced the legacy `<Reference>` with HintPath with a `<PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" />` (no version, as CPM requires).
2. **`Directory.Packages.props`** (new) — Created at the `simple-packages-config/` root with `ManagePackageVersionsCentrally` enabled and `Newtonsoft.Json` version `13.0.3` centralized.
3. **`packages.config`** — Deleted, since it's no longer needed with `PackageReference`.
